resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A selected public variant identifier is available for lookup and annotation context. No personal trait, disease, or clinical interpretation is supplied.

limitations: This validation result uses selected derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.
